prompt: A high-fashion studio sports portrait of a powerful female tennis player standing center frame against a clean light gray backdrop with the gigantic word FOCUS in ultra-bold black condensed sans-serif letters filling the entire background from edge to edge. She has deep dark brown skin with glossy editorial lighting, an athletic muscular physique, and a long sleek high ponytail. Her face is intentionally obscured and featureless, like a smooth blurred rectangular mask with no visible eyes, nose, or mouth. She wears a monochrome white tennis outfit consisting of 5 visible pieces: a halter-style sports bra, a pleated mini tennis skirt, one wrist sweatband, ribbed crew socks with a small black letter "P" logo, and white tennis shoes. Pose her in a confident dominant stance with one leg straight and the other knee raised, resting on the throat of a white tennis racket held vertically with one hand on the grip and the racket head touching the floor. The racket strings show a subtle dark geometric logo shape. The floor is a glossy reflective dark surface that mirrors both the player and the oversized text. Place exactly 6 white tennis balls scattered on the floor: 1 partially cropped in the bottom-left corner, 1 near the left side above it, 1 near the lower-left center with a visible "P", 1 near the lower-right center with a visible "P", and 2 clustered on the right side, one with a visible "P" and one with a visible lowercase "b". Use a minimal premium commercial-ad aesthetic, sharp contrast, centered composition, full-body framing, symmetrical balance, and polished magazine-quality lighting.
